case_title: LOW, HARDY VS VARGAS, ONESIMO SANCHEZ

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, ONESIMO SANCHEZ
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LOW, HARDY AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, ONESIMO SANCHEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOW, HARDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARGAS, ONESIMO SANCHEZ $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,022.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-26-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-24-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE.
